results.rendered_html:
śarkarā [śṝ-karan kasya netvam  Uṇ. 4. 3 ]
1 Candied sugar.
2 A pebble, gravel, small stone; pādukāṃtarapraviṣṭiva śarkarā  Mk. 5. 
3 Gravelly mould.
4 Soil abounding in stony fragments, sand.
5 A piece,
(pb) fragment.
6 A potsherd.
7 Any hard particle, as in jalaśarkarā a nodule of water, i. e. hail.
8 The disease called gravel.
Comp.
— udaka sugar-water, water sweetened with sugar.
— saptamī N. of an observance on the 7th day in the bright half of VaiŚākha.
